Did you know that the Lucidian record for long jumping is fifty-three feet? It is held by a frog girl.

She nods, and moves to get into a better position for sparring. As you turn to do the same, a sudden chill goes down your spine and you dive to the side as a mattress goes flying past you!
After narrowly avoiding the cushiony attack you turn back to face Ancilla, and see her calmly approaching you. You steel yourself for battle!
Having defeated Ancilla you take a moment to catch your breath and a chill goes down your spine as Ancilla walks past you from behind, completely unperturbed from her recent loss.
Is there anything else you need [ThePlayerName]?

EventText.NameOfScene: Ask Ancilla if she wants help with work around the dungeon.
theScene: Ancilla gives you a slight look of surprise through her emotionless gaze at your offer.
You do realize that, by most definitions, we are your enemies, correct?
I think humans and monsters should be able to get along.
I just want to help you.
Well when you put it like that...

EventText.NameOfScene: I think humans and monsters should be able to get along.
theScene: You blink and could swear you saw her smile for a moment...
Either you are naive, noble, or very dumb. But I will appreciate your efforts nevertheless.
Her cold monotone voice stings a little.

EventText.NameOfScene: I just want to help you.
Well when you put it like that...
theScene: Ancilla merely gives you a quiet nod and resumes her calm collected pose next to the door.
Ancilla regards you rather coldly, even for her.
I appreciate the offer, but I do not want the help of someone like you.
Please follow me. There is always more to do around here.
An imp got stuck in the walls again...
The imps held a wild party again...
An imp got stuck in the walls again...
The imps held a wild party again...
Ancilla once again hands you a duster and dustpan, brandishing her own, then two of you then set off down the winding tunnels of the dungeon once more cleaning as you go.
After hours of cleaning the dungeon's halls the two of you return to the antechamber before Sofia's room, it was a rather uneventful day, but Ancilla seems to appreciate your continued efforts.
Ancilla hands you a duster and dustpan, brandishing her own, and the two of you set off down the winding tunnels of the dungeon cleaning it.
She wordlessly moves through halls with calm grace, cleaning with such practiced ease that you're having difficulty keeping up with her. You almost feel like you're only slowing her down.
But despite {i}both{/i} your combined efforts you barely feel like you're making a dent in the dust and grime in the dungeon.
Ancilla stops for a moment to allow you both a break.
I clean the entire dungeon in sections over the course of the week, and start over from where I began so the dungeon does not get musty and overwhelmed with filth.
The other denizens of this place do at least keep their own areas clean. Barring my Mistress of course. And the imps are prone to slacking.
Ancilla begins moving forward again, cleaning as she goes at a brisk pace, and you follow suit. She keeps talking in her monotone voice as the two of you continue on.
Even with the dungeon's interior shifting on occasion by my Mistress's whims, I find it is still easy to keep track of what areas require cleaning.
...One of the positives of slimes sneaking into the dungeon is that they clean wherever they go. It truly is a shame they are impossible to keep in line.
The rest of the cleaning continues in mostly silence, with the occasional unimportant conversation about this or that, sometimes about cleaning.

Finally the two of you return back to the antechamber before Sofia's room and Ancilla returns to her spot next to the door without another word, but she still seems to have appreciated your work. You think...

EventText.NameOfScene: An imp got stuck in the walls again...
theScene: Ancilla once again hands you a duster and dustpan, brandishing her own, and the two of you set off down the winding tunnels of the dungeon once more cleaning a different part of it.
You're having an easier time keeping up with her this time as she wordlessly moves through the hallways with cold calculating grace.
Until you both eventually hear a voice through the wall.
H-Hey! Is someone there? I-I wasn't paying attention when the dungeon was shifting around, and the other imps left me behind and laughed...
An imp got stuck in the walls again... Perhaps we should leave her in there until the Mistress decides to shift the dungeon again?
Hgk-! A-Ancilla! Come on please let me out of here! I-I promise I'll clean an entire hallway! No- wait! Two hallways!
Hm, what do you think we should do [ThePlayerName]?
We should let her out with no punishment.
We should let her out and have her help us clean.
We should leave her in there.

EventText.NameOfScene: We should let her out with no punishment.
theScene: After a moment of reflection, Ancilla nods in agreement.
You may be too kind for your own good.
Ancilla proceeds to open the wall with a spell of some sort and the imp stumbles out.
The imp stares at you for a moment and proceeds to latch onto you with a sly grin.
How about we head back to my place, and me and all my friends-.
Ancilla firmly bops the imp on the head, dislodging her from you as the small demon recoils from the slight hit.
[ThePlayerName] and I have decided to let you out without punishment. You are free to go on your way.

The imp hurries off with a cheerful smile and waves back at the two of you as she rounds a corner, almost running straight into a wall... though she plays it off like she meant to do it as she disappears from sight.

This leaves you and Ancilla cleaning for quite a while, the occasional chatter breaking up the monotony of the task, but most of it is from Ancilla's cold voice and about cleaning, leaving you possibly even more bored and tired.
When the two of you return to the antechamber before Sofia's quarters, however, a surprise awaits you.
You see the imp from earlier milling about in front of the door, perking up excitedly when she notices the two of you approaching.
Ancilla subtly arches a single brow before coolly addressing the imp with her emotionless voice.
To reward [ThePlayerName] for freeing me and all his hard work! With a blowjob!♥
The imp puffs up with pride before looking over at you with a lecherous grin.
I believe that would be more of a reward for you than him.
Hgk! Wh-What? No that's crazy! Heheh...
Ancilla sighs and returns to her spot next to the large door in the room.
There is a guest room close by that the two of you can use if you wish to accept her 'reward'.
I promise it will feel {i}super good{/i}.♥
The imp lewdly shows off her tongue, and spreads her mouth a little wider with a finger in an attempt to tempt you.
Pat the imp's head as a reward.
Yes! Oh, you're going to love this!
With an excessive amount of excitement she grabs you by the wrist and urgently leads you forward, quickly bringing you to the guest room Ancilla mentioned.

EventText.NameOfScene: Pat the imp's head as a reward.
theScene: The imp looks up at you with excitement as your hand reaches forward and begins to stroke her hair and gently caress her.
But her excitement dissipates rapidly as your hand retreats and she looks at you with confusion.
My reward for all my hard work was to pat your head.
That's dumb! You're dumb! Lame! Gah!!!
The imp throws her arms up in frustration before quickly storming off in a huff, rather miffed at your choice of reward.
You hear a soft and gentle laugh behind you, and when you turn back you see Ancilla clearing her throat. Were you just hearing things or is she trying to play it off?
She then fixes her expressionless gaze back on you with a prim nod, clearly appreciative of your cleaning efforts and treatment of the imp.
The imp storms out with a pouty huff, leaving you and Ancilla alone in the antechamber. For a moment you think you see her smile. She's probably happy you didn't give in to the imp's temptation.

EventText.NameOfScene: We should let her out and have her help us clean.
theScene: Ancilla looks at you with slight concern. But nods in agreement.
She will most likely slow us down, but I did ask for your opinion.
Ancilla proceeds to open the wall with a spell of some sort and the imp stumbles out.
The imp stares at you for a moment and proceeds to latch onto you with a sly grin.
How about we head back to my place, and me and all my friends-.
Ancilla firmly bops the imp on the head, dislodging her from you as the small demon recoils from the slight hit.
You are going to be assisting us with cleaning for getting trapped. You did promise to assist with two hallways.

Ancilla hands the imp a dustpan and duster, and the three of you set off through the dungeon, cleaning as you go. Ancilla keeps a close eye on the imp and you to make sure the petite demon girl doesn't try to convince you to go down a side hallway for a quickie.

The imp often gets bored and slacks through your cleaning efforts, occasionally complaining or whining until Ancilla gives her a stern glare. This slows you and Ancilla down quite a bit, and the imp's constant temptations are leaving you a little hot and bothered.

But despite her complaints, she sticks with you and Ancilla to the end, helping with more than just the two hallways that she promised to do. Finally, the three of you return to the antechamber before Sofia's room, the imp practically dragging herself forward from apparent exhaustion.
Ughhhh... I don't get how you can do that all day every day... I'm soooo exhausted.

Easily. I would like to add that you hardly worked and merely tagged along, for the most part to flirt with [ThePlayerName]. I will be leaving it up to him if he thinks you deserve any kind of reward for your paltry efforts.
Hgk! H-Hold on! You never said anything about a reward! I- uh- I definitely did at least 25% of the work!
Pleeeease, [ThePlayerName]? Giving you a blowjob is all I want for a reward.♥
Ancilla sighs and returns to her spot next to the large door in the room.
There is a guest room close by that the two of you can use if you decide to feed her.
She's leaving you to decide if the imp gets a reward for her efforts...
Reward her by letting her suck you off.
Reward her with a head pat.

EventText.NameOfScene: Reward her by letting her suck you off.
theScene: Yes! Oh, this is going to be great!
Don't worry, you'll enjoy it too!♥
With an excessive amount of excitement she grabs you by the wrist and urgently leads you forward, quickly bringing you to the guest room Ancilla mentioned.

EventText.NameOfScene: Reward her with a head pat.
theScene: The imp looks up at you with excitement as your hand reaches forward and begins to stroke her hair and gently caress her.
But her excitement dissipates rapidly as your hand retreats and she looks at you with confusion.
Your reward for your hard work was a head pat.
That's a terrible reward! Lame! Gah! I just wanted some cum!
The imp quickly storms off in a huff, rather miffed at your apparently lackluster reward.
You hear a soft and gentle laugh behind you, and when you turn back you see Ancilla clearing her throat. Were you just hearing things or is she trying to play it off?
She then fixes her expressionless gaze back on you with a prim nod, clearly appreciative of your cleaning efforts and treatment of the imp.
The imp leaves with a pouty huff, leaving you and Ancilla alone in the antechamber. For a moment you think you see her smile. She's probably happy you didn't spoil the Imp.

EventText.NameOfScene: We should leave her in there.
theScene: Ancilla suddenly gives you a deathly cold glare that sends a shiver of fear through your entire body.
I see. So that is the kind of person you are.
Ancilla proceeds to open the wall with a spell of some sort and the imp stumbles out.
Get back to your duties, and do not worry about cleaning hallways.
The Imp quickly runs off down the tunnels, only giving you a quick glance and sticking her tongue out at you in victory for her freedom.

The rest of the cleaning continues in abject silence as Ancilla is colder towards you than normal, and eventually the two of you make it back to the antechamber before Sofia's room and she returns to her spot next to the door. You think you may have pissed her off...
It has been reported to me that a slime has snuck into the dungeon, you can help me get her out.
Ancilla then proceeds down the halls, and you follow her through the winding tunnels. She still takes the time to occasionally stop and dust away some filth from the hall as you continue onwards.

With a minor spell and a few taps on some rocks, Ancilla opens up a wall, and the two of you head into a deeper part of the dungeon, darker and damper than the rest, that she clearly cleans less often.
The corridors get tighter and more winding, but Ancilla seems to know exactly where she's going.

After a few more turns you both enter into a small dimly lit room, a slight bit of light filtering in from the slight cracks in the ceiling, illuminating a small pond of water, and water trickling in from a wall like a small waterfall.
Most notably you see a blue slime lazily resting next to the pond sighing happily as she occasionally soaks in some of the water with a finger.
Eh? Oh hello! This place is the best.
The slime sighs happily again, lounging quite contentedly. Ancilla's brow furrows slightly.
It is time for you to leave. I would appreciate it if you comply.
Huh? Why? Is the water running out?
The slime girl curiously looks over at the pond. Ancilla sighs with annoyance, and pulls out a clipboard with an assortment of notes.
You have been on record for stealing food multiple times from our stores.
Oh, the food was really good! Thank you!
Assailing at least nine different imps for their sexual juices.
The imp juices make me all giddy, and floaty, and they really enjoy it too.
You have also been scaring the matango for fun.
Ehehe, they always freak out, it's so fun.
The slime seems completely unfazed by Ancilla's accusations, and she sighs with noticeable annoyance before turning to you.
[ThePlayerName], I will need to forcibly remove her. Unless you can think of a better idea?
Forcibly removing her seems like the only option.
We should bribe her to leave.
Maybe she could stay if she cleaned up her act, and worked?
Convince the slime to work. (15 Allure)

EventText.NameOfScene: Forcibly removing her seems like the only option.
theScene: Ancilla nods and approaches slowly, step by step, and the slime is apparently oblivious to her intentions.
Due to their gooey nature, removing them by physical force is nearly impossible. However...
Ancilla reaches forward and gently pushes her hand into the slime's jellowy body, making the gooey girl shiver a little.
H-Hey, some warning would be nice...
Ancilla reaches deeper into the slime and gently grabs her floating red core, making the slime gasp.
Ah... H-Hey careful, that's my core- ah!♥ I-It's really sensitiiiiive!♥♥♥
Ancilla gently massages and squeezes the slime's core with practiced, almost mechanical ease, making the slimy girl quiver and moan.
Her calculating and methodical caress quickly brings the moaning slime to a blissful orgasm, and she fades away with a contented sigh.
Ancilla wipes her now slimy glove off with a cloth from her pocket and sighs.
She will most likely find her way back in here eventually, but that will solve the problem for now.
I would have asked you to defeat the slime to send her home, but I have become rather practiced at it. So I did not see the point.
Then why did you want me to come along to help?
I wanted you to see firsthand the issues they pose. As well as see if you had any ideas on how to deal with the issue in person.
Do not feel bad for not finding another way to deal with her, I have tried other options before, and they usually do not keep bargains well.

Ancilla quietly guides you back out of the darker part of the dungeon into the normal area, and soon you're both back at the antechamber before Sofia's room. Ancilla takes her spot next to the door with calm grace.

EventText.NameOfScene: We should bribe her to leave.
theScene: Oooo! Oooo! How about with semen?
That would only encourage her to repeat the same actions with the expectation of a reward. While fruit or other resources could be used as a bribe, the issue remains the same.
Aw, come on, I promise I won't come back...
That is a lie. [ThePlayerName], I appreciate your attempt to work something out, but bribery and payment do not work on blue slimes. Pick something else.
Unacceptable. She will only continue to harass the others and leech off our supplies.
Yeahhh, it'd get really boring just sitting around in here all day.

EventText.NameOfScene: Maybe she could stay if she cleaned up her act, and worked?
theScene: That sounds like a lot of effort... And reallllyyyy boring...
She will most certainly forget to do any work, and continue to bother everyone for her own amusement or hunger. But I appreciate your dedication to peaceful negotiations.

EventText.NameOfScene: Convince the slime to work. (15 Allure)
theScene: You walk forward and the slime looks at you curiously. You proceed to do your best to convince her of the benefits of trying to actually work here.
All the friends she could make, all the food she could eat, and she won't need to get kicked out, she could even live in this room if she wanted.
And your words seem to work as the slime's face lights up with excitement at the prospect of doing stuff and not getting kicked out. So much so she heads out the door with unbridled exuberance.
I'm going to get to it right now! Ehehe, this place will be super clean once I'm done.

The slime heads on her way with a cheerful singsong hum, leaving you and Ancilla alone in the small room. For a moment there's only silence as the slime's voice echoes in the distance, and only the trickle of water can be heard until Ancilla breaks the quiet with her cold voice.
You do realize she will most likely cause more trouble now, correct? Her exuberance may last a few days, but I am certain she will go back to being a problem.
But until she does, I must say congratulations for your success. They never listen to me. I suppose I am not the most charismatic to them with how I speak.

Ancilla gives you a quick curtsy before quietly guiding you back out of the darker part of the dungeon into the normal area, and soon you're both back at the antechamber before Sofia's room. Ancilla takes her spot next to the door with calm grace, and you think you see her giving you a faint smile for a moment.

EventText.NameOfScene: The imps held a wild party again...
theScene: Ancilla hands you a mop and pail this time, brandishing her own, and the two of you set off down the winding tunnels of the dungeon, cleaning it with surprising ease, removing the occasional stain from the walls or bit of residual goo from a blue slime.
This section of the dungeon is clearly a bit more filthy than the areas you've done before, and Ancilla seems increasingly miffed at its state.
This area should not be nearly this bad... And we should have seen an imp by now...

You progress further through the tunnel, garbage increasingly littering the hall, and slowly you hear singing echoing in the distance. Terrible singing that reminds you of a cat dying, but it's clearly high-pitched singing.
Ancilla continues the cleaning towards the source of the singing with increasing conviction in her cold march forward, eradicating each bit of trash she comes across.

You finally see a door, the loud singing reverberating from inside it, with the occasional cheer intermixing with the chorus. Ancilla moves with surprising quickness and calmly opens the door while you're still a few steps behind her.
Soon you behold the sight that Ancilla is now gazing at with cold rage as you step up behind her with a mixture of fear and curiosity.

What appears to be one of the imps' dens is completely trashed with every bit of furniture overturned and assorted bits of garbage scattered everywhere. The only unturned table in the room is surrounded by a small crowd of imps laughing, cheering, and singing. With a single imp on the table singing the loudest, dancing and holding a spoon up to her mouth like a voice amplifier, clearly having the time of her life.

A few of the imps glance back at the now opened door you and Ancilla are standing in, then they do a double take with fear spreading on their face as they notice Ancilla. A few of them try to run for the other door in the room, but Ancilla deftly throws a few pillows that knock the escapees down who let out panicked yelps.

This commotion makes the rest of the imps start to take notice of Ancilla's presence, as they nervously nudge each other and point, leaving them all standing quietly with fear. Except for the imp on the table, who is completely oblivious to what's happening, still singing horribly and dancing her heart out.
One of the imps in the crowd nudges the still dancing imp with frantic panic, and she finally stops, looking rather confused.
The imp finally lays eyes on Ancilla, dropping the spoon she was holding in shock, leaving it to clatter onto the table, and then the floor.
The imps, except for the one still standing on the table, all collectively point at the petite demon girl on that same table. She is now looking around at her former comrades with increasing panic.
Eh-?! EHH?! W-Wait! I-It wasn't me!
She frantically waves her hands in her panic, but Ancilla doesn't seem to pay the imp's words any heed. Instead she turns to you, her stern gaze lessening a slight iota as she regards you.
What do you think her punishment should be?
She should clean this entire section of the dungeon by herself.
She should have to sexually service me.
Punish them all with cleaning duty.
All the imps here should be punished by sexually servicing me.
Punish them all with a week-long entertainment ban.
Maybe they're just overworked and needed a break?
Try to convince Ancilla to take mercy on them? (20 Allure)

EventText.NameOfScene: She should clean this entire section of the dungeon by herself.
theScene: Ancilla's gaze gets a little colder staring at you as she speaks to you in her emotionless voice.

That was, in a way, a trick question. Putting the entire punishment on a single imp is cruel and unreasonable. Additionally the fault also lies with all the other imps who allowed this to happen, and we do not even know if that imp actually started this.
The imp on the table seems relieved while the rest groan with despair.

EventText.NameOfScene: She should have to sexually service me.
theScene: The imp perks up with excitement, and the others look a little miffed at her punishment. But Ancilla's gaze only gets a little colder as she stares at you, speaking in her emotionless voice.
The imp on the table seems saddened and despaired by this.

EventText.NameOfScene: Punish them all with cleaning duty.
theScene: Then it is decided. They will have cleaning duties added to their workload for a week.
The imps collectively groan and trudge forward, taking cleaning utensils from Ancilla's seemingly endless supply.
If you all are so despondent at [ThePlayerName]'s choice, I could ban any entertainment activities and any interactions with adventurers for a week.
The imps let out a chorus of panicked acceptance and hurry their movements as they begin to clean the room, and then move onto the halls with desperation.
Good. Now if I return and this area is a mess again, those will be your punishments.

Ancilla calmly walks away after ensuring all of the imps have the needed supplies, and she gestures for you to follow. Soon the two of you are back at the antechamber before Sofia's room, with a lot of time saved owing to the imps taking care of the cleaning.

EventText.NameOfScene: All the imps here should be punished by sexually servicing me.
theScene: The imps collectively perk up with excitement at your proposition. But Ancilla's gaze only gets a little colder as she stares at you, speaking in her emotionless voice.
No. But perhaps instead we ban them from entertainment activities and attacking any adventurers for a week?
The imps collectively fall into despair at the mere prospect.

EventText.NameOfScene: Punish them all with a week-long entertainment ban.
theScene: Then it is decided. They will additionally be shifted over to cleaning duty and repairs.
The imps all collectively despair in unison and trudge forward, taking cleaning tools and utensils from Ancilla's seemingly endless supply.
They give you the occasional glare of anger when they think you aren't looking as they slowly begin to fix the room up and filter into the hallways to clean them.
Good. Now if I return and this area is a mess again, I will extend your punishments.

Ancilla calmly walks away after ensuring all of the despondent imps have the needed supplies, and she gestures for you to follow. Soon the two of you are back at the antechamber before Sofia's room, with a lot of time saved owing to the imps taking care of the cleaning.

EventText.NameOfScene: Maybe they're just overworked and needed a break?
theScene: Nonsense. They hardly work as it is.
Wh-What?! We work tons! Patrolling the dungeon takes a lot of effort and we don't get days off!
Ancilla's cold glare goes back to the imp on the table and the demonic girl's conviction wilts away quickly.
And uh... Long hours... W-We keep this room clean... uh... n-normally...
They cannot be allowed mercy for their actions. But I understand your concerns, [ThePlayerName].

EventText.NameOfScene: Try to convince Ancilla to take mercy on them? (20 Allure)
theScene: You give Ancilla an impassioned speech on why she should show the imps some mercy and allow them to have more time off and relax, and she sighs and relents.
Fine. But they must still clean up the mess they made. Including the hallways.

The imps let out a cry of victory at escaping any sort of worse punishment thanks to you, in addition to potentially earning more time to relax. They excitedly take cleaning utensils from Ancilla's seemingly endless supply and get to work fixing the horrendous mess they made.
Now if I return and this area is a disastrous mess again, I will enact a proper punishment.
The imps collectively assure her it's going to be fine, some seeming more honest than others...
You and Ancilla take your leave of the imps as they clean. A few of the demonic girls wave you a cheerful goodbye, clearly appreciative of your success.
Ancilla lets out a tired sigh as the two of you leave earshot of the imps.

I may regret showing such lenience, even if I understand your conviction for allowing them breaks and fairer treatment. Though they are still horrendous slackers, I will allow them mercy this time, for your sake.
Soon the two of you are back at the antechamber before Sofia's room, with a lot of time saved owing to the imps taking care of the cleaning.
All the imps seem shocked but happy at your choice. Ancilla doesn't seem too bothered, but is much more restrained.
While I accept your noble intentions, she should not be allowed to escape her punishment so easily.

But more importantly, the punishment is actually intended for all of them, singling her out allowed me to see if you would be cruel to her... So if you are set on such an action, you will be taking all of their punishments. Alone.
The imp on the table seems relieved that she won't be the sole target of punishment, while the rest groan with despair. They don't even seem to consider that you'll take the hit for all of them.
All the imps seem surprised at your intention to take their punishments, but happy. Ancilla, meanwhile, arches a brow.
Really? You will clean this entire area of the dungeon of their mess? Alone?
The imps seem to wilt at the mere prospect of such a thing, and instantly lose hope of you taking on such a task.
Ancilla nods, and awaits your decision for the imps.
Ancilla blinks in surprise, and a few of the imps look shocked while others don't hide their joy.

Ancilla hands you cleaning supplies and sets you to your arduous task of cleaning up the room and hallways, while the imps cheerfully mill about. They clearly seem to appreciate your efforts, giving you the occasional cheer, praise, or thanks.

A few of the imps seem moved by your noble efforts, and try to help you out, but Ancilla shoots down their attempts with a glare, leaving some of the imps gazing at you working with a measure of helpless guilt. This in itself may be a punishment to the imps...

It takes hours of hard work and cleaning to fix the mess the imps made, completely exhausting you. All the while, Ancilla keeps a keen eye on your efforts, as well as on the imps to ensure they don't assist you in any way.
By the end, you feel like you want to die. And quite a few of the imps seem quite guilt-ridden. You're pretty sure they are all, at the very least, deeply grateful for your efforts.
Ancilla congratulates you coolly before half-dragging your exhausted body back to the antechamber before Sofia's room.
You truly are a fool to take their punishment for them. But a commendable fool.
Ancilla takes her spot next to the door while you recover from your arduous task. Maybe a few more minutes of doing nothing... or an hour or two...

As has now become something of a habit, Ancilla departs from her station and strides with alert no-nonsense purpose through the Forest Dungeon's stone corridors, the sheep woman not saying a word as the two of you move unerringly through the ever-changing depths of Sofia's lair, your guide's soft-padded soles scarcely making a sound as she walks ahead of you.

As minutes pass and you keep going, you notice that you're going into what seems to be a particularly deep and remote section of the dungeon, the ambient light growing fainter and the atmosphere damper while the usually omnipresent rustle of imp activity has abated to just the occasional distant muffled sound that you can scarcely hear...

You're starting to wonder if you should be worried by this change of mood, when the woolly monster girl in front of you suddenly stops next to an unremarkable door and smoothly turns towards you in order to announce with her hands neatly folded in her lap.
Here we are... This is room where the matangos are kept.
She pauses, giving you a moment to take in that information and possibly get a bit of a breather after the brisk walk you just went through, before she carries on in her trademark monotone.

In truth, what we are about to perform is no more than a routine check. Since matangos have few needs and are quite comfortable with seclusion, I am not expecting that there will be much that needs doing, if anything... In fact, your assistance is honestly superfluous, but I have elected to have you join me nonetheless in case you might be interested in seeing this aspect of the dungeon's inner workings.

Despite her habitually flat tone, stern demeanor, and stark words, her attitude somehow doesn't register as cold to you, possibly because you have gotten used to her odd behavior, although her eyebrows do slightly furrow in concern as she adds.

Still, before we get in, I must add as a word of caution that matangos are a particularly sensitive species. Thus, please remember to be mindful of your behavior towards them and to refrain from raising your voice or making sudden gestures lest you agitate them.

You can't help but feel that her warnings might be a {i}bit{/i} excessive, but nonetheless acquiesce to the instructions of the diligent maid who nods back in affirmation, then crisply turns back towards the door which she quietly opens before signaling you to proceed.
Going along with the unspoken invitation, you step in...
Ancilla leads you through a few tunnels and into one of the back rooms, which contains a few tables with sewing materials and a mountain of pillows with gouge marks from Sofia's horns in them.
This time we will be repairing Mistress's pillows to restock her supply, a task that requires careful monitoring to ensure she does not run out.
She sits you at one of the tables, setting a pile of damaged pillows next to you before taking her own, much larger pile of pillows, and setting to work.
If you are not adept at sewing, just ask me and I will assist you. Otherwise, just do your best. Do not fret over small mistakes.
Even as she addresses you with her cool monotone voice she's already set to working on the pillows with her sewing needle at an incredible pace...
Use your nimble dexterity to try and keep up with Ancilla's incredible sewing. (40 Tech)
